final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input control, // 1 for write, 0 for read
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] obf_memory; // 4-bit obf_memory cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (control) begin
            obf_memory <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory
        end else begin
            data_out <= obf_memory; // Read data from obf_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
